name: Full Stack Delivery
description: A comprehensive delivery team covering the full software development lifecycle from product ownership through frontend and backend engineering, quality assurance, code review, operations, and monitoring.

agents.role: Owns the product backlog, defines acceptance criteria, and makes prioritization decisions for each sprint
Coordinates cross-functional work, manages timelines, and removes technical blockers across the delivery pipeline
Builds and maintains the client-side application, implementing UI components and frontend logic
Develops server-side services, APIs, and data layer logic powering the application
Designs and executes test plans, performs regression testing, and validates feature completeness
Reviews pull requests for code quality, adherence to standards, and potential defects before merge
Manages CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and environment provisioning for all stages
Configures observability tooling, sets up alerts, and tracks system health and performance metrics
Maintains technical documentation, architecture decision records, and runbooks for the delivered system
